message:
test(keyboard): add overlay-scoped hotkey tests (s4qx.2.3)

Add 8 new tests verifying overlay-scoped hotkey behavior:
- Contextual actions exist for overlay-internal shortcuts
- Overlay toggle actions are global scope
- Contextual actions don't conflict with each other
- HelpOverlay has contextual detail toggle ('d' key)
- Escape is not a regular hotkey (handled by Overlay.tsx)
- Overlay actions have valid categories
- Critical shortcuts (?, /) are not shadowed

These tests ensure the overlay-scoped hotkey pattern is followed:
- useHotkey `enabled` option gates registration
- Overlay.tsx handles Escape with stopPropagation
- HelpOverlay demonstrates pattern with enabled: overlayOpen

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
